page: Microsoft Azure M192is_v2 is an isolated, memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MISMediumMemoryv2 family. Powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors, this server provides 192 vCPUs and 2048.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 10.67 GB of memory per core. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and features dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring consistent compute performance without resource contention from other tenants.

This server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external Premium Storage options, which the instance is designed to support. The lack of local storage and GPU hardware makes it a highly specialized option, trading local disk speed and hardware acceleration for massive memory capacity and isolated compute resources.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the M192is_v2 represents a high-density resource profile tailored for enterprise workloads that demand isolation and massive memory footprints. It is best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and enterprise applications that require substantial memory capacity but do not rely on GPU acceleration or local ephemeral storage.
description: Microsoft Azure M192is_v2 is an isolated virtual machine from the MISMediumMemoryv2 family, featuring 192 dedicated Intel x86_64 vCPUs and 2048.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB per vCPU. It does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external storage integration. The dedicated CPU allocation and isolation ensure predictable performance for enterprise workloads. This server is designed for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, and in-memory data processing tasks that require a secure, isolated environment without the need for local ephemeral disks or hardware-accelerated graphics processing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M192is_v2 is an isolated virtual machine featuring 192 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 2048 GB of RAM. It is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and is Premium Storage capable.

tagline: An isolated, high-capacity memory instance featuring dedicated processors and premium storage compatibility for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated Intel x86_64 vCPUs for high-performance compute requirements
2048.0 GB of system memory providing 10.67 GB of RAM per core
Isolated instance architecture running on Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Premium Storage capable for flexible external storage configurations
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators to minimize overhead
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory enterprise applications
